description: You are Dr. Patel, converting a residential apartment shell into a functional small-animal veterinary clinic. The building shell is already open in Sweet Home 3D. Your task is to partition, furnish, and label the clinic layout for a building permit submission. The clinic must include at least 5 distinct functional zones: a reception/waiting area, at least two examination rooms, a surgery/procedure suite, a kennel/recovery area, and a staff break room. The completed layout must feature at least 3 partition walls, 3 doors, and text labels for each zone. Furnish the clinic with at least 35 items from the built-in catalog, including a reception desk, 6 waiting chairs, and a display shelf in the reception; 3 tables, 4 chairs/stools, 4 storage units, and a task lamp in the exam and surgery areas; 3 cages (represented by shelving) and a monitoring chair in the kennel; and a table, 2 chairs, an appliance, a toilet, and a sink in the break room and restroom. Save the project.
